backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a school stock/inventory management backend with functions to add, update, and query inventory items, create bills (with automatic stock deduction), and retrieve totals and bills by date.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, page, hook, and utility in the React application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Global Pride International School Stock & Inventory Management' and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with auth-guarded routes (login, dashboard, inventory, billing, reports), a QueryClientProvider, and a Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/BillLineItem.tsx: Single billing line item component with an item selector dropdown, quantity input, unit price display, subtotal calculation, stock validation error display, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/EditItemModal.ts: Modal dialog for editing an existing inventory item's name, category, quantity, and price, using the useUpdateItem mutation with toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/InventoryTable.t: Renders a table of inventory items with name, category, quantity (color-coded for low/zero stock), price, and action buttons for editing or adding stock.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app shell with a collapsible sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Inventory, Billing, Reports), a top header, and an Outlet for page content; includes logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/Login.tsx: Login page with username/password form that authenticates via the useAuth hook and redirects to the dashboard on success, showing validation and error alerts.
frontend/src/components/PrintableBill.ts: Print-only receipt component displaying student name, payment mode, itemized purchase list, and grand total formatted in INR; hidden on screen and visible only when printing.
frontend/src/components/RemainingStockTa: Displays a read-only table of inventory items showing item name, category, and remaining stock quantity with color-coded low/zero stock indicators.
frontend/src/components/ReportSummary.ts: Shows three summary stat cards for a report: grand total, total units sold, and total income, each with a distinct icon and color.
frontend/src/components/SalesTable.tsx: Renders a table of sales rows with item name, quantity sold, and amount earned in INR, or an empty-state message if no records exist.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: Reusable stat card component displaying a title, value, optional subtitle, and a configurable icon with background color; supports a loading skeleton state.
frontend/src/components/UpdateStockModal: Modal dialog for adding additional stock to an inventory item, showing the current quantity and previewing the new total before submitting via the useUpdateItem mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, switching between anonymous and authenticated actors based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides simple username/password authentication using localStorage, with hardcoded credentials for a school admin session.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout state and identity to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching inventory items, adding/updating items, creating bills, fetching bills by date, and retrieving dashboard totals.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color values.
frontend/src/lib/constants.ts: Exports a static list of inventory item category names used across the application.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/Billing.tsx: Billing page component that allows users to select inventory items, specify quantities, choose a payment mode, and submit a bill, with validation and a printable bill preview on success.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page that displays four summary cards for total inventory items, available stock, units sold today, and today's income, along with a quick-start guide.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: React page for managing inventory items, providing a form to add new items with validation and modals for editing items and updating stock levels.
frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx: React page that displays date-filtered sales reports, aggregating bill data into sales summaries and showing remaining stock alongside totals.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography, border radii, box shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking pending feature requests, including adding a login page with credential validation and configuring auth guards to protect routes in the Stock & Inventory Manager app.
